# CitableLib

A research-software library with concrete extractable claims.

## Performance

Our library achieves throughput greater than 5000 operations per
second on the standard benchmark.

## Citation

If you use CitableLib in your research, please cite our paper:

```bibtex
@article{citablelib2026,
  title={CitableLib: a library},
  author={Smith, J. and Jones, K.},
  year={2026}
}
```

## How to Cite

Please cite as: Smith and Jones (2026).
